Title: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
FullTitle: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
SortTitle: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
Plot: An enchanting making-of story told through all-new in-depth interviews and cast conversations, inviting fans on a magical first-person journey through one of the most beloved film franchises of all time.
Tagline: Welcome back to where the magic began.
